utilities.note: electric + water + internet; heating significant in winter

groceries.note: home cooking; Central Market great for cheap produce

diningOut.note: Old Town and Centrs; mix of prices

simData.note: Latvian SIM; LMT or Bite; cheap data

accomSeasonality._doc: 12 monthly multipliers for RENT ONLY (Jan..Dec). 1.0 = base. Baltic capital peaks Jun–Aug.

evidence.quote: Rent for a one-bedroom apartment in the city centre averages €600–€800 per month, while outside the city centre, rent ranges from €400–€600

evidence.claim: comfortable lifestyle €1,200–€1,600/mo; Riga 70% cheaper than NYC
evidence.quote: a comfortable lifestyle costs €1,200–€1,600/month for a single expat. Riga is 70% cheaper than New York City

evidence.claim: coworking from €100 at TechChill; 4+ spaces available
evidence.quote: More than 4 coworking spaces are available, starting from €150/month. TechChill membership starting from around 100 EUR ($110 USD) per month

evidence.claim: 30-50% cheaper than Western Europe; strong digital nomad infrastructure
evidence.quote: the cost of living in Riga is around 30-50% lower than in Western European cities
